problem id: f7346f0c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  10110011 -> 01110110
  10011111 -> 11110011
  11101111 -> 11111101
  00010110 -> 11000010
  10100011 -> 01110100
  10010000 -> 00010010
  01111111 -> 11101111
  01101011 -> 01101101
  01011010 -> 01001011

query: 00101111
predicted answer: 11100101
